statusLine.command: input=$(cat); branch=$(git -C "$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir')" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir=$(basename "$cwd"); out="$dir"; [ -n "$branch" ] && out="$out  $branch"; printf '%s' "$out"
